title: Modern Labour Standards Public Survey Data - Open Government Portal
content:
## Modern Labour Standards Public Survey Data
Results of the online survey held as part of public online consultations regarding the modernization of federal labour standards, between January 11th and 31st, 2018. All respondents self-selected to take part in the survey.
- Publisher - Current Organization Name: Employment and Social Development Canada
- Licence: Open Government Licence - Canada
- Modernizing Federal Labour Standards – Online Public Consultation Survey CSV English dataset CSV Explore More information Download
- Modernizing Federal Labour Standards – Online Public Consultation Survey CSV French dataset CSV Explore More information Download
